steps.title: Set up the probability
steps.content:
Among rhesus negative people, the type B count is $2$, and the total rhesus negative count is $10+x$. So
$$\frac{2}{10+x}=\frac{1}{9}$$
steps.formula: $$P(A \mid B) = \frac{\text{count of both A and B}}{\text{total count of B}}$$

steps.title: State the missing value
steps.content: The value of $x$ is $8$. The answer is 8.
